topics.name: Hackathon Setup Guide
topics.description: This guide provides step-by-step instructions on setting up Featherless.ai for use in a hackathon, including signing up for the service, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model.
topics.displayed_info: This guide provides step-by-step instructions on setting up Featherless.ai for use in a hackathon, including signing up for the service, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model.

flashcards.a: A service for use in hackathons.

flashcards.q: What is the first step in setting up Featherless.ai?
flashcards.a: Sign up for the service.
A key used to authenticate API calls.

flashcards.q: What is the next step after signing up?
flashcards.a: Obtain an API key.

flashcards.q: What should you choose after obtaining an API key?
flashcards.a: A model.
Step-by-step instructions for setting up Featherless.ai in a hackathon.

topics.name: API Usage
topics.description: The guide explains how to make API calls using Python Requests and OpenAI SDK, providing examples for chat completions and model selection.
topics.displayed_info: The guide explains how to make API calls using Python Requests and OpenAI SDK, providing examples for chat completions and model selection.

flashcards.q: What is used to make API calls?
flashcards.a: Python Requests and OpenAI SDK.

flashcards.a: Chat completions and model selection.

flashcards.q: What is the purpose of the guide?
flashcards.a: To explain how to make API calls using Python Requests and OpenAI SDK.
A type of API call.
A process of choosing a model.

flashcards.q: What tools are used for API calls?
flashcards.a: Python Requests and OpenAI SDK.

topics.name: Core API Endpoints
topics.description: The guide details the core API endpoints for Featherless.ai, including /v1/chat/completions and /v1/completions, and their use cases.
topics.displayed_info: The guide details the core API endpoints for Featherless.ai, including /v1/chat/completions and /v1/completions, and their use cases.

flashcards.q: What are the core API endpoints for Featherless.ai?
flashcards.a: /v1/chat/completions and /v1/completions.

flashcards.q: What is the use case for /v1/chat/completions?
flashcards.a: Chatbot.

flashcards.q: What is the use case for /v1/completions?
flashcards.a: Content generation and data extraction.

topics.name: Troubleshooting
topics.description: Common errors and their solutions are provided, including 401 Unauthenticated, 403 Unauthorized, and 500 Internal Server Error.
topics.displayed_info: Common errors and their solutions are provided, including 401 Unauthenticated, 403 Unauthorized, and 500 Internal Server Error.

flashcards.a: 401 Unauthenticated, 403 Unauthorized, and 500 Internal Server Error.

topics.name: Concurrency Limits
topics.description: The guide explains Featherless.ai's concurrency limits based on subscription tier and model type, ensuring consistent performance.
topics.displayed_info: The guide explains Featherless.ai's concurrency limits based on subscription tier and model type, ensuring consistent performance.

flashcards.a: Concurrency limits based on subscription tier and model type.
Limits on the number of concurrent model inference calls.
Subscription tier and model type.

flashcards.q: What is the purpose of explaining concurrency limits?
flashcards.a: To ensure consistent performance.
Different levels of service based on features and capacity.
Different types of models with varying performance characteristics.

topics.name: Application Guides
topics.description: Detailed guides are available to help integrate Featherless.ai into existing projects and workflows.
topics.displayed_info: Detailed guides are available to help integrate Featherless.ai into existing projects and workflows. These guides are designed to assist with the integration process and are accessible through Application Guides on GitHub.

flashcards.q: Where are the detailed guides for integrating Featherless.ai located?
flashcards.a: They are located on GitHub under Application Guides.

flashcards.q: What is the purpose of the Application Guides?
flashcards.a: To help integrate Featherless.ai into existing projects and workflows.

flashcards.q: What are the guides meant to assist with?
flashcards.a: The integration process.

flashcards.q: What are some of the contexts in which these guides are useful?
flashcards.a: Integration, projects, and workflows.

flashcards.q: What are the keywords associated with these guides?
flashcards.a: Application Guides, Documentation, GitHub.

flashcards.q: How can users access these guides?
flashcards.a: Through GitHub under Application Guides.
